name: Justice Hrishikesh Roy
bio: Justice Hrishikesh Roy was elevated to the Supreme Court of India in July 2019 after serving as the Chief Justice of the Kerala High Court. He previously served as a judge of the Gauhati High Court and as an advocate in Assam. He is known for his work in areas of arbitration, constitutional law, and environmental law. Justice Roy has authored notable judgments on forest rights, environmental protection, and personal liberty.
